---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []

---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this feature and how?

- **Persona:** [developer / security analyst / site owner / DevSecOps engineer]
- **Scenario:** [describe the workflow]

## Implementation Hints (optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented:

- Which files would be affected?
- Is this a new check module, API change, or frontend feature?
- Any dependencies or external APIs needed?

## Priority Assessment

How important is this to your workflow?

- [ ] **Critical** — blocks my use of the scanner
- [ ] **High** — significant improvement to my workflow
- [ ] **Medium** — nice to have, would use regularly
- [ ] **Low** — minor improvement

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, mockups, or reference implementations.
